display.purpose: Hero headlines and main titles to capture prestige.

label.purpose: Interactive labels, metadata badges, and button text.

shadows.name: glow-halo
shadows.purpose: Diffused hover light halo using Blue Lagoon accent.

shadows.name: ambient-low
shadows.purpose: Very soft drop shadow for floating navigation elements.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for micro-interactions and transitions.

motion.name: draw-in
motion.purpose: Animation timeline for the connecting SVG line.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Standard call-to-action button in Chocolate Fondant.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background-color: #7c563f; color: #fcf9f8; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border: none; border-radius: 24px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: scale(1.02); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(73, 98, 104, 0.15); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Ghost outlined button for secondary choices.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background-color: transparent; color: #7c563f; border: 1px solid #7c563f; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; border-radius: 24px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { transform: scale(1.02); }

components.name: Orientation Card
components.description: White card container used on Ivory background.
components.html:
Theme System

A blue-forward theme with semantic tokens so light and dark surfaces stay consistent.
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #ffffff; border: 1px solid rgba(114, 120, 122, 0.15); border-radius: 24px; padding: 24px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), box-shadow 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 12px 40px rgba(73, 98, 104, 0.15); } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Playfair Display', Georgia, serif; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; color: #7c563f; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-text { font-size: 1rem; color: #1b1c1c; margin: 0; line-height: 1.6; }

components.name: Baan Chip
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; background-color: #c5e0e6; color: #7c563f; padding: 6px 12px; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; border-radius: 9999px; }

narrative.overview: The Baan 7 Main Portal design system balances the academic prestige of university life with the warmth of a welcoming student community. Built around the theme of "New Beginnings," it rejects standard, clinical SaaS layouts in favor of an organic, tactile, and highly interactive digital space. By leveraging generous whitespace, high-contrast warm typography, and subtle micro-interactions, the interface aims to reduce "freshman anxiety" and encourage exploration. Every section and component is designed to feel custom-crafted, establishing a cohesive yet diverse ecosystem across the portal's sub-modules (Freshmen/Pro Portals, Memory Board, Hype Board, Vibe Check).
keyCharacteristics: Organic color harmony featuring a warm Ivory canvas, rich Chocolate accents, and serene Lagoon Blue highlights.
Clear typographic contrast between the traditional elegance of Playfair Display and the contemporary legibility of Plus Jakarta Sans.
A tactile shape language utilizing soft 2xl rounded corners to reinforce friendliness and accessibility.
Fluid visual continuity guided by an interactive SVG line weaving between layout sections.

rules.name: The Ivory Canvas Rule
rules.body: All background surfaces default to Warm Ivory (#fcf9f8). Pure white is strictly reserved for nested card containers to create layered visual depth.

rules.name: The Accent Rarity Rule
rules.body: Blue Lagoon is used as a soft primary accent for backgrounds/glows (≤15% of screen area). Chocolate Fondant is reserved for primary actions and key typography.

rules.name: The Serif Headline Rule
rules.body: All display and headline elements must use Playfair Display. Do not use geometric sans for primary titles.

rules.name: The Line Length Rule
rules.body: Body copy must be clamped at a maximum width of 65-75ch to preserve readability.

rules.name: The Soft Glow Rule
rules.body: Do not use aggressive gray shadows. Convey depth using color boundaries (tonal shifts) or diffused Blue Lagoon halos behind featured cards.

dos: Do default to Warm Ivory (#fcf9f8) backgrounds with Pure White (#ffffff) card overlays.
Do clamp Playfair Display letter-spacing between -0.02em and -0.04em for headings.
Do support a prefers-reduced-motion CSS fallback by cross-fading elements or displaying them instantly.
Do use soft 2xl rounded corners (16px to 24px) for cards, buttons, and inputs.
donts: Don't use standard SaaS templates (e.g., left-content / right-image layouts).
Don't use bento grids or glassmorphism as a default decoration.
Don't use tiny uppercase tracked eyebrows on every section (reach for alternative cadences).
Don't use purple, indigo, or default Tailwind blues.
Don't pair borders with shadows greater than 8px blur unless utilizing the Lagoon Halo Glow.
Don't allow long heading text to overflow containers on mobile (test clamps at all breakpoints).
